title: Oil prices rise as Donald Trump issues fresh ultimatum on Hormuz; Brent nears $111
description: Oil prices surged above $100 per barrel as the Middle East conflict intensified, disrupting supply routes. US benchmark WTI climbed to $113.62 and Brent crude to $110.30 amid escalating tensions involving Iran and the United States. The Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil passage, remains under threat, impacting global energy markets.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Personalities and political loyalties to define poll outcome in central Kerala
description: The Left Democratic Front had a clear upper hand in the region comprising Ernakulam, Idukki, Kottayam and Alappuzha in 2021 as it bagged 25 of the 37 Assembly seats. But this time, the shifting of political loyalty of some candidates and the fielding of some prominent individuals in some key constituencies have made the contests worth watching.

title: Will Sophie Cunningham stay with Caitlin Clark-led Indiana Fever?
description: Sophie Cunningham’s future with the Indiana Fever remains uncertain after she went unpicked in the WNBA expansion draft. While her fit alongside Caitlin Clark has been strong, salary cap pressures and upcoming max deals for key players complicate her return. As an unrestricted free agent, Cunningham could attract interest from multiple teams, leaving Indiana to weigh financial limits against her on-court value. A decision is expected soon as free agency unfolds.

title: Iran military says U.S. rescue operation used abandoned airport in southern Isfahan
description: "The so-called U.S. military rescue operation, planned as a deception and escape mission at an abandoned airport in southern Isfahan under the pretext of recovering the pilot of a downed aircraft, was completely foiled," said Ebrahim Zolfaghari, spokesman for the military's central command, Khatam Al-Anbiya.

title: 'Dragging US towards living hell': Iran slams Trump's 'Tuesday threat' over Hormuz closure
description: Iran has strongly responded to US President Donald Trump's recent threat concerning the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran's Parliament Speaker accused Trump of reckless escalation driven by Israeli interests. Trump had issued an ultimatum demanding the reopening of the vital oil route. Iran rejected the threat, with military officials calling Trump's remarks 'stupid'.

description: Venus Williams recently shared never-before-seen engagement photos with her husband Andrea Preti, offering a heartfelt look into their relationship and extended wedding celebrations across Italy and Florida. Her candid captions reflected joy and humor, showing how deeply she still cherishes the experience. Meanwhile, her tennis future remains uncertain, with no confirmed plans for the clay season as she continues to search for her first win this year while managing a selective schedule.

title: Months after calling China ‘enemy nation,’ Anthropic’s Claude leak sparks celebration in China
description: American AI firm Anthropic, a vocal critic of China's access to its technology, has reportedly suffered a leak of its Claude Code source code. This has sparked immense interest among Chinese developers eager to study its advanced coding capabilities. The incident follows Anthropic's accusation that Chinese companies were using its AI to steal data for product development.

He highlighted missed opportunities, including a dropped catch of Virat Kohli, and a brutal finish from RCB's batters as key turning points. Despite a spirited fightback from his teammates, Gaikwad felt the game had already slipped away due to the poor start.

description: Two Ghaziabad friends, Brijesh Kumar Tripathi and Sachin Tyagi, drowned in the Ganga River in Haridwar while bathing. One slipped and was swept away by the current, while the other drowned attempting a rescue. Both bodies were recovered by rescue teams.

title: Sonos lays off staff in marketing unit: Read memo sent by CMO Colleen DeCourcy to employees
description: Sonos has reduced its marketing team. New Chief Marketing Officer Colleen DeCourcy stated the move aims for operational efficiency. The restructuring focuses on clearer roles and faster execution. DeCourcy emphasized the brand's commitment to quality remains unchanged. The company is reorganizing its marketing functions to better serve the brand's needs and accelerate growth.

This high-stakes action crime drama, boasting a lavish budget and an impressive cast including Juhi Chawla and Khushbu, unfortunately did not resonate with audiences and became a box office disaster.

EC seizes voter inducements worth over 650cr from poll-bound states, UT
description: Election Commission teams have seized over Rs 650 crore in potential voter inducements across five poll-bound states, with West Bengal leading seizures at Rs 319 crore. Freebies, drugs, and cash formed the bulk of the confiscated items. This figure is on track to surpass last year's record of Rs 1,000 crore in seizures.

title: Odisha bans sale of LPG cylinders in open market
description: Odisha has banned the open sale of LPG cylinders to combat black marketing. Only customers who have completed e-KYC can now purchase them from authorized dealers. The government assures sufficient supply, with delivery timelines of 25 days for urban and 45 days for rural consumers. This move follows recent seizures of cylinders for illegal resale.

title: 2 western disturbances to bring rain, cooler days to north-west India this week: IMD
description: North-west India will experience two western disturbances this week. Peak activity is expected on April 7-8. This will bring below normal to near normal day temperatures and a wet spell to the region. Other parts of the country will also see wet spells with thunderstorms and lightning until April 9.

title: 'State of jungle raj': PM Modi slams TMC over gherao of judicial officers in Bengal

description: A nine-judge Supreme Court bench, comprising judges from diverse faiths and a woman, will hear crucial cases on women's rights versus religious practices starting April 7. This bench aims to settle long-standing disputes, including women's entry into temples, mosques, and Parsi fire temples, and the practice of FGM. The court's 2018 Sabarimala judgment sparked these broader legal challenges.

title: BJP office blast: ISI plot hatched by handlers in Portugal & Germany, says Punjab DGP

CSK’s chase faltered early despite Sarfaraz Khan’s 50, and they were bowled out for 207.

Easter Sunday, Bloody Monday: Trump's unholy hellfire warning to Iran
description: US President Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening severe retaliation if the Strait of Hormuz remained closed. His unvarnished social media posts, including profanity, signaled potential strikes on Iranian infrastructure like power plants and bridges. This aggressive stance has ignited debate over humanitarian impact and international law, with critics fearing civilian harm and supporters citing military necessity.

The missing contest: Why 2026 elections are not about PM Modi and Rahul Gandhi
description: Far from being a PM Modi vs Rahul showdown, the 2026 elections are a test of regional resilience. Despite the visibility of the two national leaders on the campaign trail, neither is the decisive factor in these contests. Instead, the real battles are being fought by state satraps defending their turf or reclaiming relevance and the results will hinge on regional leadership, local alliances and governance records.

Inside India's ghost malls: How nostalgic hangout spots lost their magic
description: India's once-vibrant malls are becoming 'ghost malls,' with nearly 20% underperforming or empty. This decline stems from poor planning, oversupply, and a failure to adapt to changing consumer experiences, not just e-commerce. While some struggle, these spaces offer potential for reinvention into entertainment, co-working, or educational hubs.

Packers linked to $6M ex-Commanders veteran after strong season performance
description: The Green Bay Packers recorded a pretty average performance in the last season with 9 wins and 8 losses, sparking stress among fans. While the team’s performance declined since the 2024 season, when they had recorded 11 wins and just 6 losses, it seems the Green Bay Packers are fully focused on fixing their roster and could be eyeing a veteran.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
description: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: Candace Owens claims win as Blake Lively case vs Justin Baldoni dismissed
description: Candace Owens reacted after a federal judge dismissed most of Blake Lively’s claims against Justin Baldoni, leaving only three issues for trial. The ruling removed serious allegations like sexual harassment and defamation. The case will now focus on retaliation claims when the trial begins on May 18, 2026, as reported by The Guardian and Entertainment Weekly.
